claim_boundary: conditional consistency check, not a forecast model

conditional_forecast_statement.falsifier: a robust direct-detection signal above approximately 5 GeV in the cited channels would falsify the IO geometric dark-sector interpretation
conditional_forecast_statement.if_interpretation_correct: continued nulls in canonical xenon-WIMP search channels are expected
conditional_forecast_statement.not_claimed: this script does not compute a new WIMP event-rate or forecast model
